untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) 'Last 2 closes show increasing volume relative to 5-period volume average' — no 5-period volume MA in allowed indicators; (2) 'Allow entry 4+ hours after major news release' — no news event timestamp or time-based logic supported; (3) Demand-level detection is qualitative and cannot be expressed with available quantitative indicators alone
translation_notes: Translated core volume-demand conditions using available indicators (volume > sma_10, close > sma_20, vol_ratio_20 as proxy for rising demand). The consecutive volume increases over 2 bars and post-news timing constraints cannot be expressed with the allowed indicator set and require custom logic or additional data sources.
